findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The HTML document duplicates the entire page-1 letter content. After the first complete rendering of the letter (state seal, header, body text, bullet list, and footer), a second rendering of the full letterhead block (ROY COOPER / ELIZABETH S. BISER / MICHAEL ABRACZINSKAS), date, addressee, subject line, salutation, body paragraphs, and bullet list appears again before the page-2 continuation. A reader scrolling through the HTML encounters the same information twice.
findings.evidence: PDF: The letter header, 'Dear Mr. Blackman:', body paragraphs, and 8-item bullet list appear once on page 1. HTML: These elements appear first in the initial formatted rendering, then a DEQ footer and contact block intervene, after which 'ROY COOPER Governor / ELIZABETH S. BISER Secretary / MICHAEL ABRACZINSKAS Director', 'April 4, 2022', the full addressee block, subject line, 'Dear Mr. Blackman:', body paragraphs, and the same 8-item bullet list all appear a second time before the page-2 content ('In Section 7.8.3…') continues.
